result: The violent reverberations cause you to drop your weapon.
Your attack is parried and knocked away, roll to hit an adjacent target for half damage.
Your attack is parried and the target takes advantage to use an attack of opportunity.
Your footing slips, putting you off balance. The next attack against you is made with advantage.
Your weapon was knocked askew in your grip. Your next attack is made with disadvantage.
You slide on an inordinately smooth stone, moving 5 ft. in a direction of the DM's choice. This does not provoke Opportunity Attacks.
You lose your footing and slip, falling prone.

(Melee) Your grip fails from a violent impacy and you fumble the recovery. Take damage equal to a roll of your weapon's damage dice, do not add any additional modifiers.

(Ranged) Some moisture causes the weapon to slip, causing the projectile to eject erratically. Take damage equal to a roll of your weapon's damage dice, do not add any additional modifiers.

(Spell) The arcane matrix collapses, causing errant magic to flare out. Take damage equal to a roll of two of your Hit Dice.
